description: As usual assume the rest of the board is settled and that tenuki or finishing in sente is not important.

What do you do ?]AP[goproblems]
(;B[hf];W[kl]C[Actually you don't have to sacrifice these stones. You can save them AND find life for the upper group.])
(;B[kl];W[fg]LB[hf:a]C[please play at (a) now]
(;B[hf];W[gg]
(;B[bg];W[ag]
(;B[cf];W[di]

(;B[cf];W[bf]C[Black cannot even respond in A14 it would simply be atari.]))

(;B[bg];W[kl]C[Well, this is the right idea, but wrong move order. If you saw you can make an eye here, there is no reason to sacrifice L10 stones, save them at once then play here.])
(;B[fg];W[kl]C[If you wanted to take the ko, just play H14 first move. Anyway you don't have to sacrifice L10 stones.]))
source: Adapated from my game against DonDonson at KGS.
